cards.front: Basic ping vs extended ping — when to use extended?
cards.back:
**Extended ping** lets you set source interface, size, repeat count, DF bit, pattern. Useful when verifying NAT, MTU, asymmetric routing.
```
ping                                  ! interactive prompts (extended)
ping 8.8.8.8 source g0/0 repeat 100 size 1500 df-bit
```

cards.front: How to test which path packets take to a destination?
cards.back:
```
traceroute 8.8.8.8
traceroute 8.8.8.8 source loopback0
traceroute 8.8.8.8 numeric            ! skip DNS lookup
```
Each hop shows 3 RTT probes. `* * *` = no reply (filtered ICMP or down).

cards.front: How to find MTU on a path (manually)?
cards.back:
```
ping <dst> size 1500 df-bit           ! set Don't Fragment + payload size
```
Try decreasing size until ping succeeds. Smallest failing size − 28 (IP+ICMP headers) ≈ link MTU.

cards.front: How to enable real-time logs in your SSH/Telnet session?
cards.back:
```
terminal monitor
! show me logs while I'm logged in
terminal no monitor                    ! turn off
```
By default, logs go to console only. On VTY you must enable monitoring.

cards.front: Turn off paging "--More--" prompts in current session:
cards.back:
```
terminal length 0
! restore default
terminal length 24
```

cards.front: Enable timestamps + sequence numbers in logs (helpful when troubleshooting):
cards.back:
```
conf t
service timestamps log datetime msec
service timestamps debug datetime msec
service sequence-numbers
```

cards.front: How to run a privileged exec command from inside config mode?
cards.back:
```
Router(config)# do show ip interface brief
Router(config-if)# do show running-config interface g0/1
```
`do` runs the command without leaving config mode.

cards.front: Turn on a debug — what's the safety rule?
cards.back:
ALWAYS pair with `terminal monitor` and ALWAYS turn off when done. Debug is CPU-heavy and can crash a busy router.
```
debug ip ospf adj
! ... watch ...
no debug all                          ! or "u all" or "undebug all"
```

cards.front: Common useful debugs (CCNA scope):
cards.back:
- `debug ip ospf adj` — OSPF adjacency forming
- `debug ip ospf events`
- `debug ip routing` — RIB changes
- `debug ip dhcp server events`
- `debug ip nat`
- `debug spanning-tree events`
- `debug ip icmp`
Use briefly + always `undebug all`.

cards.front: How to disable ALL debugs in one shot?
cards.back:
```
no debug all
! or
undebug all
! or
u all
```

cards.front: How to clear the ARP cache (force re-ARP)?
cards.back:
```
clear ip arp                          ! all
clear ip arp 10.0.0.5                 ! one entry
```

cards.front: How to clear the MAC address table?
cards.back:
```
clear mac address-table dynamic               ! all dynamic entries
clear mac address-table dynamic vlan 10       ! one VLAN
clear mac address-table dynamic interface g0/1 ! one port
```
Static entries are not cleared.

cards.front: How to clear interface error counters?
cards.back:
```
clear counters g0/1
clear counters                         ! all interfaces — prompts confirm
```

cards.front: How to remove all routes learned by OSPF (force resync)?
cards.back:
```
clear ip ospf process                  ! restarts OSPF process (disruptive)
clear ip route *                       ! clear entire routing table (more disruptive)
clear ip route 10.0.0.0                ! one prefix
```

cards.front: How to verify image integrity on flash?
cards.back:
```
verify flash:c9300-uni…SPA.bin
verify /md5 flash:c9300-uni…SPA.bin <expected-md5-hash>
```
Catches corrupt downloads before reload.

cards.front: How to list files on flash?
cards.back:
```
dir flash:
dir /all flash:                       ! show deleted recoverable files
dir all-filesystems                   ! everything
```

cards.front: How to read a text file on the device (without copying it out)?
cards.back:
```
more flash:my-backup.cfg
more nvram:startup-config
```

cards.front: Save running-config to TFTP/SCP backup:
cards.back:
```
copy running-config tftp:
! prompts for tftp host + filename
copy running-config scp://user@host:/path/backup.cfg
copy running-config flash:backup-2026-05-25.cfg
```

cards.front: Restore config from network backup:
cards.back:
```
copy tftp: running-config
copy tftp: startup-config              ! safer — applied on next reload
```
Always test restored config in lab/maintenance window first.

cards.front: Configure config archive (auto-backup on every save):
cards.back:
```
archive
 path tftp://10.0.0.99/backup-$h-$t
 write-memory                          ! trigger archive on `wr`
 time-period 1440                      ! daily auto-archive (minutes)
```

cards.front: How to see who's logged into the device (active sessions)?
cards.back:
```
show users                            ! console + VTY sessions
who                                    ! alias
```
Includes idle time + source IP.

cards.front: How to disconnect another user's session?
cards.back:
```
clear line vty 3                      ! kills VTY line 3
disconnect <line>                     ! same effect for SSH/Telnet via this device
```

cards.front: How to check the last reload reason?
cards.back:
```
show version
! near bottom: "Last reload reason: ..."
show logging                          ! search for reload message
```

cards.front: How to test DNS resolution from the device?
cards.back:
```
Router# ping google.com
! if it resolves the name → DNS works
! check DNS config:
show hosts                            ! static hosts file
show running-config | include ip name-server
show running-config | include ip domain
```

cards.front: How to enable name resolution lookup on the device?
cards.back:
```
conf t
ip domain-lookup                      ! enable DNS resolution (default on)
ip name-server 8.8.8.8
ip domain-name lab.local
```
Disable to stop "translating" typos as hostnames:
```
no ip domain-lookup
```

cards.front: How to find what's chewing CPU?
cards.back:
```
show processes cpu sorted              ! ordered by CPU usage
show processes cpu sorted | exclude 0.00
show processes cpu history             ! ASCII graph
```

cards.front: How to find what's eating memory?
cards.back:
```
show memory statistics
show processes memory sorted
```

cards.front: How to schedule a reload + cancel it?
cards.back:
```
reload in 30                          ! reload in 30 minutes
reload at 03:00                       ! at 3am
reload cancel                         ! abort scheduled
```

cards.front: How to test if 802.1Q is correctly tagging frames?
cards.back:
1. `show interfaces trunk` — confirm trunk + native VLAN
2. From a host: tag a packet with VLAN ID and ping across — verify reaches other side
3. On switch: `debug spanning-tree events` + look for trunk going up/down
4. SPAN port + Wireshark capture — see actual tags on wire

cards.front: How to verify SSH is working before disconnecting console?
cards.back:
```
show ip ssh                           ! version + config
show ssh                               ! active sessions
! then from another device:
ssh -l admin <ip>
```
TEST SSH access BEFORE you `transport input ssh` (locks out Telnet) and walk away.

cards.front: How to verify the running version of an image matches what's expected?
cards.back:
```
show version | include image
show version | include System image
show version | include Cisco IOS
```
Cross-reference with vendor release notes for bugs/CVEs.
